title: Unique figure
wikitext:
[]: Unique figure?             Quote Post by enviropunk » Wed Apr 22, 2020 7:36 am Hello.. first time posting here I’ve been collecting figurines for a few years during my trips to Japan. One year quite a while ago I found this amazing figurine that I bought. I got it for around 1500yen, so really cheap. There are a lot of figurine stores in Akihabara, and after your 10th store you start to see a lot of repeat figurines. I went into this store that was about 3 stories all together, and was filled with all different types of toys and collectables. I I came across this and it was like nothing I had seen before. The detail is really amazing, and it looks like it can be plugged into something, maybe illuminating the inside of the plug? I’ve always thought that maybe it is some old promotional display or something. I’d love to hear your thoughts.. https://imgur.com/lj0ItoK ^ I hope that works, I have no idea what I’m doing

[]: Re: Unique figure?             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Apr 22, 2020 8:33 am That does look vaguely familiar, entry plug figures like that do get released every now and then. About that one specifically I have no idea tho, not a pilot figure guy at all

[]: Re: Unique figure?             Quote Post by Luminous » Fri May 29, 2020 4:40 am I can help. That's a LED fixture from a casino slot style "Evangelion Fruit Machine" in Japan. There's a video demonstrating the light effects possible by hooking up a LED controller and wired receiver. https://youtu.be/kdWKunpLCtA
